title: Raccoon Removal in Glendale, Queens | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Glendale, Queens. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Licensed experts serving Glendale homes & businesses. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Raccoons have become increasingly common in Glendale, Queens, attracted by the area's mix of residential properties and accessible food sources. These intelligent animals can cause significant damage to attics, chimneys, and roofs while posing health risks to your family and pets. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, humane, and effective raccoon removal services throughout Glendale.
whyUs: Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of raccoon infestations in Glendale's diverse housing stock, from single-family homes near Forest Park to multi-family buildings along Myrtle Avenue. We offer comprehensive solutions including humane trapping, permanent exclusion work, sanitization, and damage repair—all backed by our satisfaction guarantee and full licensing.
localContext: Glendale's proximity to Forest Park and the Cemetery Belt provides ideal habitat for raccoons seeking shelter and food, making local properties particularly vulnerable to intrusions. The neighborhood's characteristic brick homes, peaked roofs, and mature trees offer perfect entry points and nesting areas that our team expertly secures.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Glendale, Queens?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Glendale typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of animals, entry points requiring exclusion, and any necessary attic cleanup or damage repair. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Glendale home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service in Glendale for emergency situations. Initial trapping typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of raccoons, followed by exclusion work to seal entry points and prevent future invasions. Baby raccoon season (spring) may require additional time to ensure humane removal of entire families.

faqs.question: Are raccoons in Glendale dangerous?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons can pose several risks including rabies transmission, roundworm parasites in their feces, property damage from tearing through roofs and insulation, and aggressive behavior when cornered or protecting young. Professional removal is always recommended over DIY attempts to ensure safety for both you and the animals.

faqs.question: What attracts raccoons to Glendale properties?
faqs.answer: Raccoons in Glendale are drawn to unsecured garbage bins, pet food left outdoors, bird feeders, accessible attics and chimneys, and the abundant shelter provided by Forest Park nearby. Our team not only removes the animals but also provides guidance on eliminating attractants and securing your property against future intrusions.
